misc: Rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand
biography: Martin, a familiar face at St. Laurence Golf, is known just as well for his skill on the course as he is for the ever-present drink in his hand. Don't let his relaxed demeanor fool you, however; Martin is a fierce competitor with a proven track record.

With ten past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Martin has established himself as a seasoned player in this competition. His dedication and skill have led him to victory once in the Hector Trophée and also to a Victor Trophy win, marking him as a force to be reckoned with.

As he prepares for his eleventh appearance in the Hector Trophée in 2026, Martin undoubtedly has his sights set on adding to his list of achievements. Spectators eagerly anticipate witnessing his performance, as he brings both talent and a unique sense of ease to the game.
